ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "fname" TEXT /* Student's first name */,
  "lname" TEXT /* Student's last name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Student's current grade */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's home address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  "parent_guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent or guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_phone" TEXT /* Contact number of the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_hours" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours studied */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the study hours were recorded */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the study session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the study session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the study session took place */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., self-study, group study, tutoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_hours_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the grade is recorded */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of exam (e.g., midterm, final, quiz) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who assigned the grade */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term or semester in which the grade was recorded */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific class or subject */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who marked the attendance */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class or subject */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the attendance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extracurricular activity */,
  "participation_level" TEXT /* Level of participation in the activity */,
  "activity_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the activity */,
  "activity_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the activity */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the activity (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurricular_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "recommended_hours" INTEGER /* Recommended number of study hours */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was given */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who provided the recommendation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., accepted, pending, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., quiz, project, assignment) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who recorded the metric */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback related to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educators" (
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educator */,
  "fname" TEXT /* Educator's first name */,
  "lname" TEXT /* Educator's last name */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the educator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Educator's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Educator's contact number */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the educator's office */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "education_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the educator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the educator providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "date_given" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric to which the feedback is related */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the extracurricular activity to which the feedback is related */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES extracurricular_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout preference for the dashboard */,
  "widget_preferences" TEXT /* Preferences for widgets on the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard configuration was last modified */,
  "preferred_theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) for the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the educator who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, trend analysis) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the report (e.g., students, educators, administrators) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study goal */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the study goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date to achieve the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., In Progress, Achieved) */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who helped set the goal */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the goal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback related to the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient (student or educator) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the alert message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Unread, Read) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., reminder, notification, warning) */,
  "urgency" TEXT /* Urgency of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES educators ("educator_id")
)
